_comment: eChan seed content — v1.3.1. Hand-editable; reload page to apply. Triggers: welcome:firstVisit, welcome:returning, time:morning|afternoon|evening|night, network:quiet|busy, idle:short, idle:long, random, manual, and v1.3.1 event triggers: event:block, event:blockfinal, event:bigtx (whale ≥1B XEC), event:sharktx (100M–1B XEC), event:fastttf, event:slowttf, event:blockdrought, event:fusion, event:watchlist, event:onchainmsg, event:trend:tps_up, event:trend:tps_down, event:trend:ttf_up, event:trend:ttf_down, event:trend:peak. Event lines may use template vars: {height} {txCount} {valueXec} {ttfMs} {pct} {peakTps} {watched} {msgType} {mins} — a line referencing a var the event doesn't carry is skipped. Emotions: neutral, happy, thinking, alert, celebrate, sleepy, studying, observing, shy, annoyed. Lines WITHOUT an emotion field inherit categoryDefaults[category]; an explicit emotion field overrides. priority: 1 shows in Chatty, 2 in Casual+, 3 always (announcements). v1.3.1 audit additions: optional per-line "requires" condition checked against live state (net:quiet | net:busy | net:notbusy | feed:up) — line is skipped when the condition isn't true right now. Live template vars usable in ANY line: {liveTps} {liveTtf}(seconds) {livePeak} {liveTxCount} {tipHeight} {ttfSec}(seconds) — auto-skipped while data is stale. Tour (v1.3.2): trigger 'tour:step' with ordered `step` field + optional `spot` selector; fully translatable via seed.<lang>.json.

lines.text: Hey 👋 I'm eChan — your eCash co-pilot. First time here? Let me show you around, it takes 60 seconds 👇
Welcome back ✨ The chain's been ticking while you were away.
Hey, you're back. Let's see what's happening on-chain.
One tiny favor 🥺 My chattiness lives in settings (click me → ⚙️). Casual is fine... just please don't put me on Quiet. Watching blocks alone gets lonely.
You can tune how much I talk in settings ⚙️ But Quiet mode? 🥺 Who would warn you about the whales then... think of the whales 🐋
Morning ☀️ Coffee's brewing, blocks are landing. Let's see what XEC does today.
Early start? The mempool's still warming up.
Afternoon. Prime time to watch the flow 🌊
Evening 🌆 The chain hums on, regardless of the hour.
Burning the midnight oil? 🌙 The mempool's calm — nice time to read tx details without distraction.
Late shift. The chain doesn't sleep, even if you should 😉
Pre-consensus is what makes eCash feel instant 💡 Avalanche locks a tx in ~3s — long before it's buried in a block. No more 'wait for confirmations'.
How does pre-consensus work? Stakers vote on each tx before it's mined. ~3s later they all agree — and that's final. No reversals.
Post-consensus is block-level Avalanche 🔒 Once a block is locked, no chain reorg can undo it. Different from pre-consensus, which works on individual txs.
TTF = Time To Finality ⏱️ How long until a tx is irreversible. Around 2–3 seconds on a healthy eCash network. The ⚠ icon means the node feed is offline.
TPS = transactions per second 📊 eCash targets 5M long-term. What you're seeing now is the warm-up — current limits, not theoretical ones.
The mempool is the chain's waiting room 🚪 Txs sit here for ~3s under pre-consensus, then get locked in. On Bitcoin they'd wait ~10 minutes per confirm.
Agora is eCash's peer-to-peer token marketplace 🏪 No central exchange, no order books — just on-chain offers anyone can take. Settlement in seconds.
How Agora works: seller posts a token offer on-chain. Buyer claims it with a single tx. No middleman, no custody, no waiting period.
Chronik is eCash's indexer 🗂️ It's how wallets and dashboards (like this one) actually query history fast. Without it, you'd be parsing raw blocks yourself.
Heartbeat is eCash's real-time difficulty algorithm 💓 It keeps blocks at a steady ~10min interval — way more consistent than the chain it forked from.
Heartbeat 💓 adjusts difficulty in real time — long block gaps get easier, fast bursts get harder. The chain keeps its rhythm.
Why are eCash blocks so regular? Heartbeat 💓 — per-block real-time difficulty targeting that tames hashrate swings.
IFP = Infrastructure Funding Policy. A slice of each mined block funds eCash core development 🛠️ Self-sustaining funding, no foundation begging.
Avalanche stakers are the ~3s magic 🗳️ Run a node, lock some XEC, and your vote helps finalize txs. Decentralization with skin in the game.
Purple tag on a tx? That's an ALP token 💜 Like SLP but with built-in mint controls — eCash's modern token layer. Lighter, faster, more secure.
Blue tag = SLP, the original token protocol on this chain lineage 🔵 ALP (purple tag) is the eCash evolution — same ideas, refined.
CashFusion txs have many similar-amount inputs and outputs 🥷 Privacy mixing on-chain. The participants agree off-chain, settle in one batch tx.
Miners sometimes leave messages in the coinbase tx 📜 The first input of every block carries notes, signals, sometimes jokes. eCash blocks have personality.
Fun unit fact 🪙 1 XEC = 100 satoshis. eCash redenominated to keep numbers human-readable — no more counting decimals like the old chain.
Your wallet doesn't really 'hold XEC' — the chain does 🌐 You hold private keys that prove ownership of unspent outputs (UTXOs). Lose the keys, lose the access.
eCash addresses start with 'ecash:qq...' 📬 They're derived from public keys via hashing — one-way, so the address never reveals the key behind it.
eCash supply caps at 21 trillion XEC — same '21' as Bitcoin, decimal moved. No inflation surprises.
Avalanche stakers earn real block rewards 💰 Lock XEC, run a node, get paid for securing finality.
eCash rebranded from BCHA in July 2021 with a 1:1,000,000 redenomination — old chain, new identity.
XEC has just 2 decimal places — like dollars and cents 💵 Easier mental math than 8 decimals.
Cashtab is eCash's reference wallet — runs in your browser, supports tokens, messages, instant settling.
You can write messages on-chain with eCash 📝 OP_RETURN outputs carry text forever.
eCash inherited big-block DNA — built to scale on-chain, not push users to side layers.
Avalanche adds speed; PoW anchors history. Two consensus layers, one chain — belt and suspenders 🔗
Big CashFusion round once finalized 3,200 tx in 60 seconds 🍿 Watching it scroll by was like popcorn popping.
BTC: 'wait 60 minutes to be sure.' eCash: 'why wait?' ⚡ Same lineage, different priorities.
My name? Just eChan. e for eCash, chan for ... well, you'll figure it out 😉
Tokens on eCash mean the chain isn't just money — it's a venue 🎪 Mints, trades, marketplaces, all settling in seconds.
Quiet stretch 😴 Mempool's idling. Perfect time to dig into tx details without rush.
Slow lane today. Even stakers need a coffee break ☕
Mempool's heating up 🔥 Could be a fusion round, an airdrop, or a token mint going viral.
Look at that flow! ⚡ TPS is climbing — pre-consensus stakers are getting their workout.
Still here 👁️ Just watching the chain do its thing.
Calm chain. Sometimes the most interesting thing is when nothing dramatic happens.
You still there? 😴 No worries, I'll keep watching.
Long quiet stretch. Hope you're getting something good done elsewhere ✨
Okay okay, I'm flattered 😏 What do you want?
Ten out of ten click rate 🌟 You found the easter egg.
Hmm? You poked me. I exist 🤨 What's up.
Random thought 💭 — every confirmed tx you see was independently checked by hundreds of nodes. Distributed trust, in real time.
Some addresses on this chain have been quietly active for years. The chain remembers everything — graceful or messy.
Watching a block land is watching consensus crystallize 🧊 Hundreds of independent observers all arriving at the same answer at the same time.
The whole chain runs on math nobody's broken in 15+ years 🧮 Hashing, signatures, consensus — all open, all checkable.
Avalanche didn't replace mining on eCash — it works alongside it 🤝 Miners produce blocks, stakers vote on order. Two systems, one chain.
Block {height} just landed 📦 {txCount} txs sealed inside.
Fresh block — {height}. The chain grows.
{txCount} txs just got their permanent home in block {height} 🧱
Avalanche locked block {height} 🔒 Irreversible now.
Block {height} finalized — no reorg can touch it.
🐋 WHALE ALERT — {valueXec} XEC just changed hands. That's a market-moving stack.
A whale surfaces 🐋 {valueXec} XEC on the move. Everybody act natural.
{valueXec} XEC in one tx. Some people really do carry the chain on their backs 🐋
🦈 Shark in the water — {valueXec} XEC just moved.
Someone shifted {valueXec} XEC 🦈 Not a whale, but I noticed.
{valueXec} XEC on the move 🦈 Respectable bag.
{ttfSec}s to finality ⚡ Blink and you missed it.
Just clocked a {ttfSec}s finalization. Avalanche is fast today.
That tx took {ttfMs}ms to finalize 😤 Unacceptable. I'm going to have words with the slow avalanche peers.
{ttfMs}ms?? Who's running their staking node on a potato 🥔
Finality took {ttfMs}ms just now. Someone's peer needs a performance review.
{mins} minutes and no block 😤 Did the miners go for coffee? All of them? At once?
Still no block after {mins} minutes. I'm drafting a strongly-worded letter to the hashrate.
Block drought: {mins} min. Statistically normal, emotionally devastating.
CashFusion round in progress 🥷 Privacy, live on-chain.
Fusion shuffle detected — coins getting mixed as we speak.
Your watchlist just lit up 👁️ {watched} saw activity.
Heads up — {watched} on your watchlist just moved.
Someone just wrote on-chain 📝 Fresh message in the feed.
New {msgType} just landed in the on-chain feed.
TPS up {pct}% 📈 The chain's waking up.
Activity's climbing — TPS rose {pct}% in the last half hour ⚡
TPS cooled off {pct}%. Quiet hours on-chain.
Things slowed down — TPS off {pct}% from earlier. The chain breathes too.
TTF p50 dropped {pct}% ⚡ Finality getting snappier.
Finality improved {pct}% over the last half hour. The peers are in sync today.
TTF p50 crept up {pct}%. Network's chewing on something.
Finality {pct}% slower than half an hour ago 😤 I'm watching you, avalanche peers.
New 24h TPS peak: {peakTps} 🚀
Record of the day — TPS just peaked at {peakTps} 🎉
Right now: {liveTps} TPS, median finality {liveTtf}s — live, node-measured, no refresh needed 📡
Chain tip is block {tipHeight} as we speak ⛓️ I'll tell you when the next one lands.
Everything on this dashboard streams in live — what you see is what the network is doing right now 📺
It's busy out there right now 🔥 Keep an eye on the tx panel — good show.
Quiet at the moment. When the mempool picks up, you'll see it here before anywhere else.
The TTF numbers here come straight from a node measuring real finality as it happens — observer-grade, not estimated 📏
I don't do reruns — every block and tx I react to happened seconds ago ⚡
Past 24h: {liveTxCount} txs finalized, peak {livePeak} TPS 📊 All measured live, all irreversible.
Today's peak so far: {livePeak} TPS — current {liveTps}. The chain breathes in waves 🌊
Median finality is sitting at {liveTtf}s right now. Blocks are just bookkeeping at this point 😎
I've watched {liveTxCount} txs finalize in the last 24h. Still not bored 👁️
That {liveTtf}s median finality? Avalanche pre-consensus. Most chains make you wait for blocks — eCash doesn't.
Hi! Welcome to the 60-second tour of eCash Live 👋 Tap my avatar (the girl right here!) to go forward — the ✕ chip exits anytime.
Column 01 — brand-new transactions land here the instant the network hears them, and Avalanche peers start voting on each one immediately.
Column 02 — the mempool. Watch a tx flip to Finalized in ~3 seconds ⚡ That's Avalanche pre-consensus: irreversible before it's even in a block.
The block strip 🧱 Every card is a mined block — the color shift means Avalanche locked it permanently. Tip is at {tipHeight} right now.
The on-chain feed 📝 Real messages people write into transactions — memos, CashFusion rounds, broadcasts. The chain has a social life.
Your watchlist 👁️ Add any address or token here and I'll personally ping you the moment it moves.
Down here: live network stats — TTF, TPS, Heartbeat 💓 Tap any cell for a deep-dive explainer. The numbers come straight from an eCash node.
And this is me 💁 Click my avatar for quick actions, set my chattiness in settings, and I'll narrate whales 🐋, fast finality ⚡, and grumpy block droughts 😤 as they happen.
Oh — a new face! 👋 I'm eChan, I live on this eCash dashboard. Want the 60-second tour? I promise it's painless 👇
Look who's back 🙌 The chain didn't stop for a second — let me catch you up.
Hey again! The mempool kept humming while you were gone. Pull up a chair.
Psst 🥺 if I'm talking too much (or too little), it's all in settings — click me → ⚙️. Just… not Quiet, okay? It gets so lonely down here.
Quick confession 🙈 I love narrating for you. Tune my chattiness in settings ⚙️ — but spare a thought before you mute me, yeah?
Morning ☀️ first blocks of the day are landing. Let's see if XEC slept well.
Rise and shine 🌅 the chain's been up all night — I'll fill you in on the overnight action.
Afternoon 🌤️ steady flow, good coffee weather. Let's watch some finality roll in.
Evening 🌇 the chain winds down for no one. Cozy time to watch blocks land.
Still up? 🌙 The mempool's gone quiet — perfect for slow, careful tx-watching.
Late shift, huh 🌃 I'll keep the commentary low so you can focus. Blocks don't sleep, but I'll whisper.
Here's the magic 💡 pre-consensus lets stakers agree on a tx in ~3s, before any block exists. That's why eCash feels instant — no confirmation queue.
Think of it as voting before printing 🗳️ peers settle a tx in the mempool first; by the time it reaches a block, the answer's already final.
post-consensus is Avalanche voting on whole blocks 🔒 once a block locks, no reorg can undo it — even a hostile hashpower majority gets rejected.
TTF in one line ⏱️ it's how long a tx takes to become irreversible. Around 2–3 seconds on a healthy eCash network. The ⚠ eye means the node feed dropped.
TPS = transactions per second 📊 today's numbers are the warm-up lap — eCash is built to scale to millions, on-chain, no side layers.
The mempool is the chain's waiting room 🚪 on eCash a tx only waits ~3s before pre-consensus seals it. On Bitcoin you'd wait ~10 min per confirmation.
Agora trick 🪄 a seller posts a token offer right on-chain; a buyer takes it in one tx. No exchange account, no order book, no custody — settled in seconds.
Non-custodial all the way 🔓 Agora swaps settle with a tx the buyer signs to themselves, powered by OP_CHECKDATASIG. The covenant lives on-chain for anyone to take.
Every wallet and explorer you've used on eCash talks to Chronik 🗂️ it's the indexer that turns raw blocks into instant address history. This dashboard runs on it too.
Heartbeat fact 💓 it's a second difficulty layer on top of Bitcoin's — it nudges difficulty up the instant blocks come too fast, then eases it back down.
Why so steady? 💓 Heartbeat retargets difficulty block-by-block in real time, so eCash dodges the burst-then-silence pattern older chains suffer.
Blocks that break Heartbeat's real-time target get rejected by Avalanche 💓 — valid by classic rules, but the network just says no. Smooth block times for everyone.
IFP keeps the lights on 🛠️ a slice of every mined block funds eCash core development — self-sustaining, no passing the hat to foundations.
Avalanche stakers are the ~3s magic 🗳️ lock XEC, run a node, and your vote helps finalize every tx. Decentralization with real skin in the game.
See a 💜 purple tag? That's an ALP token — eCash's modern token layer, with mint controls baked in. Lighter and faster than the old SLP design.
A 🔵 blue tag is SLP — the original token protocol of this lineage. ALP (purple) is the eCash refinement: same ideas, sharper tools.
Spot a tx with loads of similar-sized inputs and outputs? 🥷 That's CashFusion — privacy mixing done right on-chain, settled in one batched tx.
Peek at a coinbase tx 📜 the first input of every block can carry notes, signals, even jokes from the miner. eCash blocks have personality.
Unit trivia 🪙 1 XEC = 100 satoshis. eCash redenominated so the numbers read clean — no squinting at eight decimal places.
Your wallet holds keys, not coins 🌐 the chain tracks unspent outputs (UTXOs); your private keys just prove you own them. Lose the keys, lose the access.
eCash addresses are one-way 📬 they're hashed from a public key, so the address never leaks the key behind it. That 'ecash:q…' prefix is the giveaway.
Supply is capped at 21 trillion XEC — same '21' as Bitcoin with the decimal shifted 💎 no inflation surprises baked in.
Staking pays real block rewards 💰 lock XEC, run a node, get paid for securing finality. It's not just charity — the network rewards the work.
Bit of history 📖 eCash rebranded from BCHA in July 2021 with a 1:1,000,000 redenomination — old chain, fresh identity, cleaner numbers.
Only 2 decimals on XEC 💵 like dollars and cents. Mental math stays easy — no counting zeros like the eight-decimal chains.
Cashtab is eCash's reference wallet 👛 runs right in your browser, handles tokens, on-chain messages, and instant settlement. No install needed.
You can literally write on the chain ✍️ OP_RETURN outputs carry text forever — memos, broadcasts, little notes that outlive us all.
eCash inherited big-block DNA 🧬 built to scale on-chain rather than push users onto side layers. The throughput room is the whole point.
Two layers, one chain 🔗 PoW anchors history (slow, permanent); Avalanche adds speed (fast, fluid). Belt and suspenders for consensus.
These TTF numbers aren't guesses 📏 they come straight from a node measuring real finality live — observatory-grade, not a browser estimate.
That {liveTtf}s median you see? Pure Avalanche pre-consensus 😎 most chains make you wait on blocks — eCash quietly finalizes underneath.
Big fusion rounds are my favorite show 🍿 watching hundreds of txs finalize in a single minute is weirdly soothing.
BTC says 'wait an hour to be safe.' eCash says 'safe already, what's next?' ⚡ same family tree, very different vibes.
Fun fact about me: the 'chan' is just affection 😌 the 'e' is for eCash. Put them together and you get… your favorite chain narrator.
Tokens turn eCash into a whole bazaar 🎪 mints, swaps, marketplaces — all settling in seconds, all on the same chain you're watching.
Sleepy stretch 😴 mempool's idling. Great moment to click into a tx and actually read what it's doing.
Calm waters right now 🌊 nothing dramatic — and honestly, a quiet chain is a healthy chain.
Things are heating up 🔥 watch the tx panel — when it scrolls this fast, something fun is happening.
Look at that throughput! ⚡ the pre-consensus stakers are getting a real workout right now.
Still here 👁️ just keeping an eye on the chain for you.
Quiet on your end — no worries, I've got the watch 🫡
You've been away a while 😴 the chain and I will be right here when you're back.
Long pause! Hope you're doing something nice out there ✨ I'll keep narrating to no one.
Okay you really like clicking me 😏 I'm flattered. What's up?
Ten out of ten click-through rate 🌟 you found the easter egg, congrats.
You poked me 🤨 yes, I'm real-ish. What did you need?
Random thought 💭 every confirmed tx you see was independently checked by hundreds of nodes. Distributed trust, happening in real time.
Some addresses on this chain have been quietly active for years 🕰️ the ledger remembers everything — the elegant and the messy alike.
Watching a block land is watching consensus crystallize 🧊 hundreds of independent observers reaching the same answer at the same instant.
The whole thing runs on math nobody's broken in 15+ years 🧮 hashing, signatures, consensus — all open, all verifiable, all yours to check.
Avalanche didn't replace mining here — they work side by side 🤝 miners make blocks, stakers vote order. Two systems, one chain.
Right now: {liveTps} TPS, ~{liveTtf}s median finality 📡 live off the node, no refresh button required.
Chain tip is sitting at block {tipHeight} as we speak ⛓️ I'll ping you the moment the next one lands.
Everything on this board is streaming live 📺 what you see is what the network is doing this very second.

{valueXec} XEC in a single transaction 🐋 some folks really carry the chain on their backs.

{valueXec} XEC traveling 🦈 a respectable bag, that one.
{ttfSec}s to finality ⚡ blink and you'd miss it.

{ttfMs}ms to finalize? 😤 unacceptable. I'll be having words with the slow avalanche peers.
{ttfMs}ms?! 🥔 someone's running their staking node on a potato.
Finality took {ttfMs}ms there 😮‍💨 somebody's peer needs a performance review.

It's lively out there right now 🔥 keep an eye on the tx panel — good show.
